settings.summary: For athletes, runners, padel players and anyone who sweats for real. IONIQ replaces the electrolyte, the nootropic, the magnesium and the recovery drink with one sachet — calibrated to what the body actually loses, so your hydration, recovery and clean energy stay locked in. No caffeine. No sugar. No flavoured water.
settings.atc_meta: Tax included. Shipping calculated at checkout. 60-day risk-free guarantee — refund any unused box.

settings.title: Key benefits
settings.body: Sustained energy from a full mineral charge, not stimulants. Mental clarity — Cognizin® citicoline, L-tyrosine, Rhodiola. Faster recovery — magnesium, ALCAR, taurine. Longevity support — pH 12 alkaline, hydroxyl ions. Hydration that reaches your cells — bamboo salt + 70+ trace minerals.

settings.title: How to use
settings.body: Tear one sachet, pour into 500ml of cold water, stir until dissolved. Drink in the morning — ideally before your first coffee. On training days: one pre-workout, one within 30 min of finishing.

settings.title: Full ingredient list
settings.body: 9× fire-roasted bamboo salt (sodium, potassium chloride, 70+ trace minerals, hydroxyl ions), magnesium citrate, Cognizin® citicoline, L-tyrosine, Rhodiola rosea (3% rosavins), ALCAR (acetyl-L-carnitine), taurine, natural lemon flavour, organic stevia leaf extract.

settings.title: Nutritional info
settings.body: Per sachet (5,000mg total active): Energy 8 kcal · Sodium 750mg · Potassium 200mg · Magnesium 50mg · Cognizin® 250mg · L-Tyrosine 500mg · Rhodiola 200mg · ALCAR 300mg · Taurine 500mg · Total sugars 0mg · Caffeine 0mg.

settings.heading: Real hydration needs real sodium.
settings.copy: Sodium is the mineral your body actually loses when you sweat — and the one most sports drinks under-dose for taste, not performance.
settings.foot: This formula is designed for real hydration. Not flavoured water.

settings.label: What your body loses
settings.description: A single hour of intense effort can drain over a gram of sodium from your body. Heavy sweaters lose even more in heat.

settings.label: In typical sports drinks
settings.description: The bestsellers under-dose sodium by 4–6× compared to what an athlete actually loses. You're chasing a deficit you can't close.
A clinical dose calibrated to what the body actually loses — sourced from 9× fire-roasted bamboo salt, not industrial sodium chloride.

settings.heading: Bamboo Salt.
settings.lede: 9× fire-roasted at 1,500°C — a Korean tradition practised for over 1,000 years, now in a daily sachet.

settings.title: pH 12 — most alkaline food on Earth
settings.body: Supports a healthy acid-alkaline balance.

settings.title: 70+ trace minerals
settings.body: Far beyond sodium, potassium and magnesium.

settings.title: Hydroxyl ions
settings.body: The only food-based source — supports cellular antioxidant activity.

settings.title: No fillers, no artificial minerals
settings.body: Just bamboo salt — exactly as it comes from the kiln.

settings.eyebrow: What IONIQ does for your body
settings.heading: 5 benefits. One sachet.
settings.foot: No caffeine. No proprietary blends. No compromise.

settings.text: Sustained energy from a full mineral charge

settings.heading: The four things athletes feel first.
settings.copy: Within the first 7 days on IONIQ, members tracking training data report measurable changes across the four metrics that move the needle on performance.

settings.title: Endurance improvement
settings.body: Pre-loaded sodium expands plasma volume so the heart pumps less for the same workload. Same effort, longer before fatigue.

settings.title: Hydration efficiency
settings.body: Sodium-glucose co-transport pulls water into cells — not just through them. 9× more trace minerals than sea salt means deeper rehydration.

settings.title: Reduced cramps
settings.body: The 3:1 sodium-to-potassium ratio matches what you lose in sweat — and 50mg magnesium clears calcium after contraction. Cramps stop happening.

settings.title: Mental sharpness, no crash
settings.body: 950mg of nootropics — Cognizin®, L-tyrosine, Rhodiola. Stay sharp during long sessions. Maintain focus under fatigue. No caffeine crash.

settings.heading: Same coverage. One product. $168 less.
settings.copy: Most people stack electrolytes, nootropics, minerals, antioxidants and anti-inflammatories — roughly $210 a month across five products. IONIQ does it in one.
settings.foot: Same coverage. One product. $168 less per month.

settings.heading: The athlete protocol.
settings.copy: Four moments. One sachet each. Calibrated to where your body actually loses sodium, electrolytes and mental focus.
settings.foot_title: Most members settle into 1 morning + 1 pre-workout
settings.foot_sub: Athletes in hot climates or 2-a-day training run the full protocol. Sedentary days: just the morning sachet.

settings.title: Pre-training
settings.body: Pre-load 750mg sodium and the Cognizin® nootropic stack so your plasma volume and focus are both up before you start.

settings.title: Post-sweat
settings.body: Magnesium relaxes muscle, ALCAR fuels mitochondrial repair, sodium pulls water back into cells. The 30-min recovery window matters most.

settings.title: Daily ritual
settings.body: You wake up 1–2% dehydrated. One IONIQ before your first coffee covers overnight loss and pre-loads focus for the day.

settings.title: Heavy days
settings.body: For sessions over 90 minutes, 2-a-day training, heat exposure, or sauna recovery — three sachets is well within safe electrolyte ranges.

settings.headline: Cramping just stopped
settings.body: Used to cramp in the third set every match in summer. One IONIQ before warm-up, one between sets. Hasn't happened in three months. My second serve is still there at 5–5.
settings.name: Sarah K.

settings.headline: Long-run recovery is night-and-day
settings.body: Switched off sugar gels mid-block, ran the IONIQ protocol pre and post. Two months in, my recovery between long runs is the best it's been in five years.
settings.name: Mark P.

settings.headline: Sharper in the third set
settings.body: Padel in Dubai heat is brutal — by the third set I'd be sloppy on the glass. One before warm-up, one mid-match. Focus stays sharp until the end.
settings.name: James D.

settings.headline: Replaced four products with one
settings.body: Was carrying electrolyte tabs, a pre-workout, magnesium for sleep, and a vitamin B12 spray. Now it's one sachet pre, one post. Same training load, less stuff.
settings.name: Marco L.

settings.headline: Hot-weather riding finally works
settings.body: Used to bonk on summer rides — bottle of sugar drink wasn't cutting it. IONIQ pre, IONIQ during, IONIQ post on big days. Heat doesn't break me the same way anymore.
settings.name: Anna R.

settings.headline: The mental focus is the unlock
settings.body: Strength gains were already there, but the focus on heavy days under fatigue — that was new. Nootropics actually working at clinical doses.
settings.name: Tom G.

settings.heading: Feel like yourself again.
settings.copy: Try IONIQ for 60 days. If you don't notice cleaner energy, sharper focus and better recovery, send the box back — we'll refund you, no questions asked.
